name: ios_pentest
description: iOS penetration testing: IPA static analysis, binary protections, ATS/Info.plist checks, Frida SSL bypass, keychain dumping, iOS CVE assessment
author: 0xb0rn3 | github.com/0xb0rn3

optional_dependencies.libimobiledevice: Device comms (ideviceinfo, ideviceinstaller) — apt install libimobiledevice-utils
optional_dependencies.frida: Runtime instrumentation + SSL bypass — pip3 install frida-tools
optional_dependencies.objection: Automated Frida pentest framework — pip3 install objection
optional_dependencies.class-dump: ObjC class extraction from unencrypted binaries — brew install class-dump
optional_dependencies.jtool2: Binary analysis (PIE, encryption, entitlements) — download from jtool.io
optional_dependencies.otool: Binary protections (built into macOS Xcode tools)
optional_dependencies.plutil: Plist conversion to JSON (built into macOS)
optional_dependencies.sshpass: Password-based SSH to jailbroken device — apt install sshpass
optional_dependencies.frida-ios-dump: IPA extraction from encrypted apps — pip3 install frida-ios-dump

help.description: iOS security testing suite covering non-jailbroken static analysis and jailbroken dynamic instrumentation. Performs IPA binary inspection (PIE, stack canary, ARC, encryption flags), ATS configuration audit, Info.plist analysis, Frida SSL bypass, keychain dumping, and live CVE assessment via NVD.

udid.description: Device UDID — auto-detected when a single device is connected

ipa_path.description: Path to local .ipa file for static-only analysis (no device required)

ssh_host.description: IP address of jailbroken device for SSH-based deep testing

ssh_pass.description: SSH password — default is 'alpine' for most jailbreaks (change it)

search_secrets.description: Scan IPA and filesystem for hardcoded API keys, tokens, and credentials

deep_analysis.description: Full binary analysis: all Mach-O sections, ObjC metadata, Swift symbols

ssl_bypass.description: Inject Frida SSL bypass script to intercept pinned HTTPS traffic

frida.description: Enable Frida-based dynamic instrumentation (requires frida-server on device)

nvd_api_key.description: NVD API key for higher CVE lookup rate limits (optional)

examples.description: Static analysis of a local IPA (no device needed)
Full pentest on jailbroken device with SSL bypass

features: IPA binary protection checks: PIE, stack canary, ARC, encryption flags
Info.plist key analysis: permissions, URL schemes, exported services
Frida SSL pinning bypass for HTTPS traffic interception
Keychain dump on jailbroken devices (SSH + frida-ios-dump)
Live iOS CVE assessment via NVD REST API v2
Works without jailbreak for static IPA analysis
Supports checkra1n, unc0ver, palera1n, dopamine jailbreaks

installation_tiers.basic: Static IPA analysis only — no device or tools required
installation_tiers.full: Dynamic testing — requires frida-tools, objection, sshpass

notes: AUTHORIZATION REQUIRED: Only test apps and devices you have explicit permission to test
Provide ipa_path for static-only analysis without a connected device
Default SSH credentials for common jailbreaks are root/alpine — change them immediately after jailbreaking
frida-server must be running on the device for dynamic instrumentation
Keychain dumps contain real user credentials — handle responsibly
